repos.name: vitorhugo-java
repos.description: Config files for my GitHub profile.

repos.name: almighty-blocker-unstoppable
repos.description: Almighty Blocker: The unstoppable hosts file enforcer. Built in Go, it locks down your redirect rules using native OS services (systemd/SCM) and a robust primary/watchdog heartbeat system to prevent bypasses.

repos.name: OrganizerV2
repos.description: 🚦 Cross-platform file organizer daemon — watches folders and automatically sorts files into category subfolders by extension. Supports Windows and Linux.

repos.name: Organizer
repos.description: A Simple Python Folder Organizer to Windows 10 and 11, it send a notification when organize some files with two button, one open Windows Explorer with file moved selected and another to open the file.

repos.name: distributed-gateway-order-system
repos.description: 🚀 Distributed Order System architecture featuring an API Gateway with JWT Authentication, WebClient dynamic routing

repos.name: java-faces-quick-start
repos.description: A production-ready Jakarta EE 10 kickstarter for building Java Faces applications. Ships with a complete login system out-of-the-box — registration, e-mail verification, password reset — so you can focus on building your features instead of your auth plumbing.

repos.name: angular-animeseason-jikan
repos.description: A fast, responsive seasonal anime tracker built with Angular and powered by the Jikan API (MyAnimeList). Features an optimized, clean UI for browsing current and upcoming anime releases.

pinnedRepos.name: SpringAPI_EspacoGeek
pinnedRepos.description: A robust Spring Boot backend powering Espaço Geek. Features a comprehensive GraphQL API for managing geek culture media libraries (Anime, Movies, TV Series, Games), user watch-lists, JWT authentication, and automated data processing pipelines with Spring Batch.

pinnedRepos.name: NextJS_EspacoGeek
pinnedRepos.description: The modern, responsive frontend application for the Espaço Geek platform, built with Next.js and React. It consumes a robust GraphQL API via Apollo Client and features a dynamic UI styled with Tailwind CSS, built-in internationalization (i18n), JWT-based authentication, and user profile management for tracking geek culture media (Anime, Movies etc)

pinnedRepos.name: SpringBoot-JobApplyTracker
pinnedRepos.description: ⚙️ Robust REST API for the JobApplyTracker system. Built with Spring Boot and MariaDB, featuring JWT authentication, Flyway migrations, and comprehensive monitoring with Prometheus & Grafana.

pinnedRepos.name: React-JobApplyTracker
pinnedRepos.description: 🚀 A modern, responsive frontend application to track and manage job applications. Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS, it features a comprehensive dashboard, application status tracking, and authentication.
